sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ احْتِرَامَ الْكِبَارِ وَاجِبٌ عَلَى كُلِّ شَخْصٍ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da je poštivanje starijih obaveza svake osobe.
sentences.translationEn: I think that respecting elders is an obligation for every person.

sentences.arabic: الْكِبَارُ عِنْدَهُمْ تَجْرِبَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ نَسْتَفِيدُ مِنْهَا.
sentences.translation: Stariji imaju veliko iskustvo od kojeg možemo imati koristi.
sentences.translationEn: Elders have great experience that we can benefit from.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَجْلِسَ مَعَ جَدِّي وَأَسْمَعَ قِصَصَهُ.
sentences.translation: Volim sjediti s djedom i slušati njegove priče.
sentences.translationEn: I like to sit with my grandfather and listen to his stories.

sentences.arabic: كَلَامُ الْكِبَارِ يُعَلِّمُنَا أَشْيَاءَ لَا تُوجَدُ فِي الْكُتُبِ.
sentences.translation: Govor starijih nas uči stvarima koje ne postoje u knjigama.
sentences.translationEn: The words of elders teach us things that are not found in books.
